user.title: Select Heart Rate Monitor
user.description: Choose your BLE heart rate monitor from the list of discovered devices.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Setup
bluetooth_confirm.description: Set up {name} as a heart rate monitor?

abort.no_devices_found: No BLE heart rate monitors found nearby. Make sure your device is active (chest strap worn, or sensor activated).

init.title: Heart Rate Zones
init.description: Configure your heart rate zones using the Karvonen (heart-rate-reserve) method. %HRR = (HR − HRrest) / (HRmax − HRrest). Zones: <60% recovery, 60–75% aerobic, 75–90% threshold, ≥90% anaerobic.
